claim_boundary.next_gate: Expand O3 beyond the simple screen or close O1 optimizer completeness; or falsify R14 with a valid equivalent reparameterization that reaches the pi/4 grid.
claim_boundary.what_is_not_supported: R14 does not prove general parameterization invariance and does not close O3. NL-C02 is still not a checked negative lemma. No R5 reroute, R1 solution, occurrence removal, proxy-T reduction, B7 credit, resource saving, or impossibility theorem is supported.
claim_boundary.what_is_supported: R14 finds no pi/4-grid escape in the declared simple periodic, sign, and pi-complement reparameterization screen over the R13-bound five-parameter domain.

decision.why: The simple periodic/sign/pi-complement screen finds no pi/4-grid escape, but O3 remains open because general local-unitary reparameterization invariance is not proved.

requirements.label: R13 source-domain binding is validation-clean and O4-closed
Exact-decomposition source is validation-clean and still has five off-grid parameters
Screen covers the R13 canonical parameter domain
Screen covers six transform families and five period shifts
All 150 simple reparameterization probes are present
No simple reparameterization reaches the pi/4 grid tolerance
Every parameter has a best-screen row recorded
Screen is hash-bound to R13 and exact-decomposition sources

evidence.why: The simple periodic/sign/pi-complement screen finds no pi/4-grid escape, but O3 remains open because general local-unitary reparameterization invariance is not proved.

requirements.label: Screen does not close O3 or upgrade NL-C02
Screen preserves zero resource and B7 credit claims

title: B1/B7 Cone01 R14 NL-C02 Reparameterization Escape Screen Gate
